title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 05 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 05 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 05 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 05/08/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked and keep downward all the day.The main contract closed at 780.5,increased of 1.30%. Traders are generallymotivated to ship, Speculative demand increases. Steel mills are mainly on the sidelines, and market turnover continues to pick up.PBF at Shandong port dealt 766-786 yuan/mt;,increase 10 yuan/mt than yesterday;SSF at Shandong port dealt 630-645 yuan/mt,increase 15 yuan/ mt.PBF at Tangshan dealt 770 yuan/mt,increase 10 yuan/mt than yesterday.
